zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Auberville於1225年出生在英國英格蘭肯特達特福德時，她的父親William d'Auberville29歲，母親Isabel Biset25歲。她於1245年與Henry de Sandwich在英國英格蘭肯特普雷斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1280年10月30日在英國肯特普雷斯頓享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Auberville于1225年出生在英国英格兰肯特達特福德时，她的父亲William d'Auberville29岁，母亲Isabel Biset25岁。她于1245年与Henry de Sandwich在英国英格兰肯特普雷斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1280年10月30日在英国肯特普雷斯頓享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Auberville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Turberville  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Turberville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, probably from Thouberville (Eure), or possibly from Trubleville (Seine-Maritime), both in France. The two may have been confused in surname usage.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Auberville was born in 1225, in Dartford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, William d'Auberville, was 29 and her mother, Isabel Biset, was 25. She married Henry de Sandwich in 1245, in Preston, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 30 October 1280, in Preston, Kent, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Auberville est née en 1225, à Dartford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William d'Auberville, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabel Biset, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Sandwich en 1245, à Preston, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 30 octobre 1280, à Preston, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Auberville 1225 in Dartford, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William d'Auberville 29 und ihre Mutter Isabel Biset 25. Sie hat 1245 in Preston, Kent, England, United Kingdom Henry de Sandwich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. Oktober 1280 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Preston, Kent, England.

Lei sposato Henry de Sandwich nel 1245, nel Preston, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 ottobre 1280, nel Preston, Kent, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Auberville(이)가 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 더르트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Auberville(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Biset(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 플레스턴에서 Henry de Sandwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 10월 30일 영국 켄트 플레스턴에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Sandwich в 1245 г. в местности престон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.
